nodes.title: open
nodes.body: Opens an existing .akg file or creates a new empty one; returns a Store.
nodes.heading: Opening a store

nodes.title: Store
nodes.body: The main class for reading and writing an AKG knowledge graph.
nodes.heading: API

nodes.title: putNode
nodes.body: Writes or replaces a node at (typeName, id); returns a NodeRef.
nodes.heading: Writing nodes

nodes.title: putEdge
nodes.body: Writes or replaces an edge between two existing nodes.
nodes.heading: Writing edges

nodes.title: getNode
nodes.body: Returns the node at (typeName, id), or null if it does not exist.
nodes.heading: Reading

nodes.title: listNodes
nodes.body: Returns all nodes, optionally filtered to a given type name, sorted by key.
nodes.heading: Reading

nodes.title: listNodesByTag
nodes.body: Returns all nodes carrying the given tag, sorted by key.
nodes.heading: Reading

nodes.title: outboundEdges
nodes.body: Returns all outbound edges from a node, optionally filtered by relation.
nodes.heading: Reading

nodes.title: inboundEdges
nodes.body: Returns all inbound edges to a node, optionally filtered by relation.
nodes.heading: Reading

nodes.title: commit
nodes.body: Durably writes all pending in-memory mutations to the .akg file.
nodes.heading: Committing and closing

nodes.title: close
nodes.body: Commits outstanding mutations and closes the store; safe to call with no pending mutations.
nodes.heading: Committing and closing

nodes.title: deleteNode
nodes.body: Deletes a node; throws NotFoundError if missing, InvalidInputError if live edges remain.
nodes.heading: Deleting nodes and edges

nodes.title: deleteEdge
nodes.body: Deletes an edge; throws NotFoundError if the edge does not exist.
nodes.heading: Deleting nodes and edges

nodes.title: compact
nodes.body: Rewrites the .akg file with only live records, discarding WAL history and tombstones.
nodes.heading: Compaction

nodes.title: listNodesFiltered
nodes.body: Returns nodes matching a NodeFilter combining type, tag, and metadata criteria.
nodes.heading: listNodesFiltered

nodes.title: getNodes
nodes.body: Batch-fetches nodes by NodeRef array; returns null at positions where a node does not exist.
nodes.heading: getNodes

nodes.title: listEdges
nodes.body: Returns all edges, optionally filtered by relation or metadata.
nodes.heading: listEdges

nodes.title: snapshot
nodes.body: Returns a JSON-serializable Snapshot of all live nodes and edges in deterministic order.
nodes.heading: snapshot

nodes.title: recentNodes
nodes.body: Returns nodes sorted newest-first by updatedAt, with optional type, tag, and limit filters.
nodes.heading: Recency helpers

nodes.title: recentEdges
nodes.body: Returns edges sorted newest-first by updatedAt, with optional source, relation, and limit filters.
nodes.heading: Recency helpers

nodes.title: reconcileOutboundEdges
nodes.body: Synchronizes the outbound edges for a source node and relation to exactly the desired target set.
nodes.heading: Edge reconciliation

nodes.title: deleteNodeCascade
nodes.body: Deletes all inbound and outbound edges then deletes the node; returns a CascadeDeleteResult.
nodes.heading: Cascade delete

nodes.title: NodeRef
nodes.body: Identifies a node by type and id; returned by putNode and accepted by edge and query methods.
nodes.heading: NodeRef

nodes.title: NodeFields
nodes.body: Input fields for putNode: title (required), body (optional), meta (optional).
nodes.heading: Writing nodes

nodes.title: Node
nodes.body: A node record returned by read operations; includes id, type, title, body, meta, tags, and SDK-managed timestamps.
nodes.heading: Reading

nodes.title: EdgeFields
nodes.body: Input fields for putEdge: strength (default 0.5), confidence (default null), meta (optional).
nodes.heading: Writing edges

nodes.title: Edge
nodes.body: An edge record returned by read operations; includes from, relation, to, strength, confidence, meta, and timestamps.
nodes.heading: Reading

nodes.title: NodeFilter
nodes.body: Filter criteria for listNodesFiltered: type, tag, and meta with AND semantics.
nodes.heading: listNodesFiltered

nodes.title: EdgeFilter
nodes.body: Filter criteria for listEdges: relation and meta.
nodes.heading: listEdges

nodes.title: Snapshot
nodes.body: JSON-serializable record of all live nodes and edges returned by store.snapshot().
nodes.heading: snapshot

nodes.title: ReconcileResult
nodes.body: Result of reconcileOutboundEdges: counts of added, removed, and unchanged edges.
nodes.heading: Edge reconciliation

nodes.title: CascadeDeleteResult
nodes.body: Result of deleteNodeCascade: counts of deleted inbound edges, outbound edges, and node.
nodes.heading: Cascade delete

nodes.title: NotFoundError
nodes.body: Thrown when a deleteNode or deleteEdge target does not exist.
nodes.heading: Error handling

nodes.title: InvalidInputError
nodes.body: Thrown when a caller passes an argument that violates a format or semantic constraint.
nodes.heading: Error handling

nodes.title: MissingRequiredFieldError
nodes.body: Thrown when a required field is absent, such as omitting title in putNode.
nodes.heading: Error handling

nodes.title: Write-Ahead Log (WAL)
nodes.body: Mutations are held in memory and appended to a WAL on commit; not visible to other processes until committed.
nodes.heading: Committing and closing

nodes.title: Compaction
nodes.body: Rewrites the file to contain only live records, discarding WAL history; caller-triggered, never automatic.
nodes.heading: Compaction

nodes.title: Single-writer semantics
nodes.body: Only one process should have a store open for writing at a time; concurrent access produces undefined behavior.
nodes.heading: Concurrency and single-writer semantics

nodes.title: Naming rules
nodes.body: Type names, relation names, and tags must be lowercase [a-z0-9_] with no leading, trailing, or consecutive underscores.
nodes.heading: Naming rules

nodes.title: Delete edges before nodes
nodes.body: You must delete all inbound and outbound edges before deleting a node; the graph does not cascade-delete automatically.
nodes.heading: Deleting nodes and edges

nodes.title: Uncommitted mutations are lost
nodes.body: Mutations held in memory are lost if the process exits without calling commit or close.
nodes.heading: Committing and closing
